headline: Elon Musk Fostered Culture Of Drug Use Among Senior Leaders At Tesla And SpaceX, Report Says
summary: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk has reportedly created an environment where drug use is seemingly normalized

headline: If You Invested $1000 In Apple When Steve Jobs Returned To Apple 28 Years Ago, Here's How Much You'd Have
summary: If you had invested $1,000 in Apple stock when Steve Jobs returned to Apple 28 years ago, here's how much you would have now.
